case_title: GLOBAL LIBERTY INSURANCE COMPANY OF NEW YORK VS. ALEX IGNACIO SAN MIGUEL ET AL
cause_of_action: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS (equitable subrogation, damages)

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-30-2015 CONTINUED TO NOV-25-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-25-2015 CONTINUED TO FEB-24-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
